name: hardware_home_camera_aligned_v2

alignment.camera2_reference_pose: simultaneous live 2026-07-22 hardware home wrist frame

observed_contract.camera1: wrist-camera assembly remains at the lower-center edge with the arm folded out of the workspace
observed_contract.camera2: white moving finger is left and green fixed finger is right, with only the distal fingers entering from the lower frame

notes: The calibrated LeRobot motor coordinates are retained as the hardware anchor.
The MuJoCo home uses the hardware-shaped canonical folded pose and is validated against simultaneous live camera1/camera2 frames.
The earlier camera2 reference was captured at wrist_flex=1690 rather than the home wrist_flex near 2038 and is not used by this candidate.
The previous v1 image-aligned dataset remains immutable for provenance.
